# Underground Garden

> South Florida underground bass events — pool parties, beach parties, warehouse nights, and community donation events across Miami and Fort Lauderdale, building toward Subtropics, a beach music festival at Virginia Key Beach in 2028.

Underground Garden is an independent, community-first electronic music brand
founded by Chris and Marco in February 2021. Events rotate across venues in
Miami and Fort Lauderdale. Tickets are sold through Shotgun:
https://shotgun.live/en/venues/underground-garden-events
Contact: info@ugevents.com

## Pages

- [Home](https://ugevents.com/): Brand overview and next upcoming event
- [Events](https://ugevents.com/events.html): 2026 event calendar and past-event flyer archive
- [Subtropics](https://ugevents.com/subtropics.html): The 2028 flagship beach festival — story, timeline, presale list
- [About](https://ugevents.com/about.html): Founders, story, and values
- [Gallery](https://ugevents.com/gallery.html): Photo and video recaps from past events
- [Merch](https://ugevents.com/merch.html): Apparel drops
- [FAQ](https://ugevents.com/safety.html): Age policy, tickets, entry, accessibility, house rules
- [Contact](https://ugevents.com/contact.html): Bookings, partnerships, press kit
